items: Added third party emote support from BetterTTV, FrankerFaceZ, and 7TV.
Added setting to remove emotes from messages added to the queue.
Added display of system messages like connection status and subscriber alerts.
Added the ability to quickly scroll back to new messages when scrolled.
Added ability to filter out mentions from speech.
Added different timestamp formats for the chat preview.
Added clickable URL links in the chat preview.
Bug fix: chat and queue not resetting when changing channels.
Bug fix: large messages causing scroll issues.
Added this very changelog dialog so you can see what's been added each update!
Toasts now appear at the top-center of the screen instead of the bottom-right.
Bug fix: settings being reset when an input field is empty.
Bug fix: chat messages causing dropdown menus to scroll back to default position.
